case_title: PASCUA JUDY ANN VS CAPELLE VINCENT ANDREW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PASCUA JUDY ANN AS TO DEFENDANT CAPELLE VINCENT ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPELLE VINCENT ANDREW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASCUA JUDY ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPELLE VINCENT ANDREW $1,125.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,164.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ON THIS CASE WILL BE VOIDED AND UNENFOR- CEABLE UNLESS A PROPERLY EXECUTED POS IS FILED WITH THE CLERK OF THIS COURT WITHIN 45 DAYS
